Name: test_sla_violation_message_contains_context
Description: Exception message must include env name, path, elapsed time, and threshold.

Name: test_sla_violation_is_assertion_error
Description: SLAViolation must subclass AssertionError so pytest marks it FAILED not ERROR.

Name: test_sla_passes_at_exact_threshold
Description: elapsed == threshold — boundary value, NOT a violation (operator is strict >).
